FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class NavigationView

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

Adaptive NavigationView modeled on WinUI's SplitView-backed template: expanded / compact / minimal LEFT modes plus the TOP display mode (horizontal items + overflow flyout), a WinUI-style pane toggle row, section headers, separators, pinned footer items (+ the auto settings item), an AutoSuggestBox slot, per-item InfoBadge slots, and the sliding selection indicator.

Behavior verified against microsoft-ui-xaml controls\dev\NavigationView\NavigationView.cpp: • Adaptive thresholds (cpp:1448-1458): width ≥ ExpandedModeThresholdWidth → Expanded; 0 < width < CompactModeThresholdWidth → Minimal; else Compact. Defaults 1008 / 641 (NavigationView.idl:176-181 MUX_DEFAULT_VALUE). An adaptive transition INTO Compact/Minimal closes the pane (cpp:1477-1483). • Pane close on invoke (cpp:4838-4845 ClosePaneIfNeccessaryAfterItemIsClicked): only when the pane is open AND the display mode is not Expanded AND the clicked item has no children. • Home/End focus the first/last item (cpp:2755-2761 → KeyboardFocusFirstItemFromItem/Last); Up/Down move through the visible rows; Right expands / first child, Left collapses / parent (the hierarchy semantics). • Alt+Left closes a light-dismissible (overlay) pane (cpp:3127-3136; IsLightDismissible cpp:1841-1849 = the SplitView is not Inline/CompactInline — here: the adaptive mode is not the inline Expanded pane). • PaneClosing is CANCELABLE (cpp:1708-1714); DisplayModeChanged fires on mode transitions (SetDisplayMode). • SelectionFollowsFocus (cpp:3408-3411): keyboard focus moves select the focused item. • Settings item: an auto-generated footer item with the Setting symbol (E713) named "Settings" (cpp:1318-1349 CreateAndHookEventsToSettings; appended to the footer source, cpp:868-874). Opt-in here via IsSettingsVisible (engine default FALSE — WinUI defaults true, but existing apps author their own settings footer item; enabling both would double it). • Item ramp (NavigationView_themeresources.xaml:9-34): rest=SubtleFillColorTransparent, hover=Secondary, pressed=Tertiary, selected=Secondary, selectedHover=Tertiary, selectedPressed=Secondary; foreground = TextFillColorPrimary in every state EXCEPT Pressed/SelectedPressed → TextFillColorSecondary (:21-34). • Overlay pane background = NavigationViewDefaultPaneBackground = AcrylicInAppFillColorDefaultBrush (:5); the always-visible Expanded pane = SolidBackgroundFillColorTransparent (:6) so the window Mica shows through. • Selection indicator 3×16 @ r2 (:220-222), AccentFillColorDefault (:48), slid by the NavPill spring. Top mode uses the horizontal variant (16×3 under the item). • Pane toggle: 40×36 (PaneToggleButtonWidth/Height :205-206) with the static E700 hamburger — the shipped template's FALLBACK glyph for the AnimatedIcon source (PaneToggleButtonStyle FontIcon); the engine renders the fallback path (press-scale affordance via AnimatedIcon.Glyph), it does not rotate (neither does WinUI's).

Fields

AutoSuggest

The AutoSuggestBox slot (WinUI AutoSuggestArea): rendered under the pane title row when the pane is open; the compact rail shows a search button that opens the pane (the PaneAutoSuggestButton behavior).

public Element? AutoSuggest

Field Value

Element

CompactModeThresholdWidth

WinUI CompactModeThresholdWidth — 0 < width < this ⇒ Minimal (default 641, idl:176-178).

Nav

Ambient navigate action for descendants that need to drive selection without prop threading.

public static readonly Context<Action<string>> Nav

Field Value

Context<Action<string>>

NavigateRequest

External navigate seam (the titlebar search commit): set a nav-item key to select it (collapsed ancestor groups expand to reveal it). Ignored when empty or unknown.

public Signal<string>? NavigateRequest

Signal<string>

Action<NavPaneClosingArgs>

PaneDisplayMode

WinUI PaneDisplayMode: Auto (adaptive), forced Left modes, or Top.

public NavPaneDisplayMode PaneDisplayMode

Field Value

NavPaneDisplayMode

PaneToggleRequest

External pane-toggle seam (the titlebar hamburger): BUMP the value (+1) to request one toggle — the same mode-aware action as the internal hamburger (expanded↔rail inline; open↔close the overlay otherwise).

public Signal<int>? PaneToggleRequest

Field Value

Signal<int>

PaneWidth 

public float PaneWidth

Field Value

float

PartIndicator

The sliding 3×16 selection pill (WinUI SelectionIndicator). Owned: Key (the NavPill reconcile identity). The slide spring (NavPill) and opacity fade are HOOK-driven AnimEngine channels — a modifier cannot clobber them; do not add a Position-channel Animate here.

public const string PartIndicator = "Indicator"

Field Value

string

PartItem

A left-pane item row (WinUI NavigationViewItem). Owned: Key, Role, Focusable, OnClick (the select/expand activate), Animate (the hierarchy-reflow spec), OnRealized (row capture, chained), Children. NOTE: pane items are NOT virtualized, but the modifier runs once per item per render — keep it cheap.

public const string PartItem = "Item"

Field Value

string

PartItemIcon

An item's icon column (icon + compact InfoBadge overlay). Owned: Children.

public const string PartItemIcon = "ItemIcon"

Field Value

string

PartItemLabel

An item's label wrapper (the slide+fade enter/exit host). Owned: Animate (the label transition), Children.

public const string PartItemLabel = "ItemLabel"

Field Value

string

PartPane

The left pane column — both the expanded/overlay pane AND the compact icon rail. Owned: Width (the mode/collapse-driven pane width), ClipToBounds + Animate (the presented-width Reveal) on the full pane, OnKeyDown on the compact rail, Children.

public const string PartPane = "Pane"

Field Value

string

PartPaneHeader

The pane title row (back + hamburger + title). Owned: Children.

public const string PartPaneHeader = "PaneHeader"

Field Value

string

PartSettingsItem

The auto settings footer row (IsSettingsVisible) — applied AFTER PartItem on the same row; same owned props.

public const string PartSettingsItem = "SettingsItem"

Field Value

string

Parts

Lightweight per-part styling (CSS ::part): modifiers keyed by the PartXxx consts; see TemplateParts for the contract. Top-mode bar items are not part-routed (different structure).

public TemplateParts? Parts

Field Value

TemplateParts

ShowPaneToggle

WinUI IsPaneToggleButtonVisible: false hides the pane's own hamburger — the WinUI-gallery shape, where the TitleBar owns the toggle and drives it via PaneToggleRequest.

public bool ShowPaneToggle

Field Value

bool

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
